label: SENSORY_NEURONAL_OTIC_PLACODE
rationale: HDCA-assigned. CL:0000032 describes the placodal *ectoderm*, not the differentiated sensory neuron derived from it. HDCA cells are POU4F1+/EYA1+/SIX1+ delaminated post-placodal sensory neurons. Better stop-gap match would be CL:0000101 (sensory neuron) — broad. NTR needed for "otic-placode-derived sensory neuron / cochleovestibular sensory neuron".
